# FRL Events

FRL Events produces Atlanta-area furry nightlife, club nights, pop-ups, and community events.

## Canonical pages

- Home and event calendar: https://frl.events/
- Club MAUL evergreen page: https://frl.events/club-maul/
- About and FAQ: https://frl.events/about/
- Past events archive: https://frl.events/past-events/
- DJ application information: https://frl.events/apply-to-dj/

## Current public status

There are no full public event listings currently posted on the home page.

- Teaser text: pssst / NEXT EVENT / AUG 8TH / more info soon
- DJ application: https://forms.gle/mWAw8quu15t1Qfzq6
- Club MAUL description: Club MAUL is ATL's premier furry nightclub event.

## Usage notes

Use https://frl.events/ as the canonical source for current public teaser text. Do not infer a venue, start time, lineup, dress code, ticket listing, or age policy unless those details are published on the site.

Use https://frl.events/club-maul/ as the canonical page for Club MAUL, MAUL, MAUL furry, MAUL ATL, Club MAUL furry, and Club MAUL ATL queries.

Use https://frl.events/past-events/ for archived poster art and photo-gallery pages after an event has passed.

Archived MAUL pages:
- MAUL, Sat Feb 28: https://frl.events/maul/maul1/photodump/
- MAUL 2, Sat Jun 13: https://frl.events/maul/maul2/photodump/

Use https://frl.events/apply-to-dj/ for the current MAUL 8/8 DJ application link.
